claimText: Central and State Co-operative Banks have been brought under the ambit of the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 (RB-IOS, 2021).
evidenceExcerpt: The Central and State Co-operative Banks have been brought under the ambit of the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 (RB-IOS, 2021)...
examUse: Statement-based question to test knowledge of entities covered under the scheme.
distractorHooks: Only Central Co-operative Banks are included.
Only State Co-operative Banks are included.
Co-operative banks are excluded from the scheme.

claimText: The inclusion of Co-operative Banks under the RB-IOS, 2021 was enabled by the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
evidenceExcerpt: The Central and State Co-operative Banks have been brought under the ambit of the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 (RB-IOS, 2021) under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching the scheme with its parent legislation.
distractorHooks: The inclusion was under the RBI Act, 1934.
The inclusion was under the Co-operative Societies Act.
A new act was passed specifically for this purpose.

claimText: The objective of the RB-IOS, 2021 is to provide a speedy, cost-effective, and expeditious alternate grievance redress mechanism for customers of regulated entities.
evidenceExcerpt: The scheme's objective is to provide customers of regulated entities a speedy, cost-effective, and expeditious alternate grievance redress mechanism.
examUse: Statement-based question about the purpose and nature of the scheme.
distractorHooks: The scheme is the primary, not alternate, grievance mechanism.
The scheme is designed for inter-bank disputes, not customer grievances.
The scheme's primary objective is to impose penalties on banks.
